body:
Hi Jeffrey,
   
  Hope you're having a good day. Wanted to know if you're back. I lost your number...would love to talk to you. Do you have my number? :)
   
  415 424-8955 
   
  N. 

       
---------------------------------
Be a better friend, newshound, and know-it-all with Yahoo! Mobile.  Try it now.
